proof:

  ┬À -- Prove the left side: 0 Ôëñ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z

    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - (1 - x - y)), sq_nonneg (x - (1 - x - y)),

  ┬À -- Prove the right side: y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z Ôëñ 7 / 27
    have h5 : z = 1 - x - y := by linarith
    rw [h5]
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - (1 - x - y)), sq_nonneg (x - (1 - x - y)), 
              sq_nonneg (x + y - (1 - x - y)), 
              mul_nonneg (show 0 Ôëñ x by linarith) (show 0 Ôëñ y by linarith), 
              mul_nonneg (show 0 Ôëñ y by linarith) (show 0 Ôëñ 1 - x - y by nlinarith),

      sq_nonneg (x - 1/3), sq_nonneg (y - 1/3), sq_nonneg ((1 - x - y) - 1/3)
    ]
  constructor
  ┬À exact h3
  ┬À exact h4
